scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.eas-build-pre-install:
node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('pnpm-workspace.yaml','packages:
  - artifacts/mobile
  - lib/*
  - lib/integrations/*
  - scripts

catalog:
  '@tanstack/react-query': ^5.90.21
  react: 19.1.0
  react-dom: 19.1.0
  zod: ^3.25.76
  tsx: ^4.21.0
  drizzle-orm: ^0.45.2

autoInstallPeers: false
')" && rm -f pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
